title: Sombor, Vojvodina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sombor, Vojvodina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sombor is a city in Vojvodina with a population of 48,000. A charming city in Vojvodina known for its Baroque architecture, the Provincial Museum, and the nearby Apatin nature reserve on the Danube.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
